setup_woocommerce.sh line 237: wp wc product create --name="Organic Cotton T-Shirt"; setup_task.sh line 25 sets initial price to 20.00
setup_woocommerce.sh line 238: wp wc product create --name="Slim Fit Denim Jeans"; setup_task.sh line 30 sets initial price to 40.00
setup_woocommerce.sh line 239: wp wc product create --name="Merino Wool Sweater"; setup_task.sh line 36 sets initial price to 100.00

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a WooCommerce test environment with two product categories: 'Clothing' (target) and 'Electronics' (control). Three products in the Clothing category—Organic Cotton T-Shirt ($20.00 initial), Slim Fit Denim Jeans ($40.00 initial), and Merino Wool Sweater ($100.00 initial)—are designated for a 15% price increase. The control group includes two Electronics products (Wireless Bluetooth Headphones at $80.00 and USB-C Laptop Charger 65W at $30.00) that must remain unchanged. The verifier checks that target products increase to their original price × 1.15 (within $0.01 tolerance) and that control products remain exactly unchanged. VLM verification confirms use of WooCommerce's Bulk Edit interface and category filtering.
